requests.prompt: Grand Chinese underworld judgment hall, traditional imperial throne room mixed with modern technology. A massive red glowing digital display screen showing productivity numbers. Rows of empty wooden seats, small ghostly translucent figures whispering. A large imposing figure in red traditional robe seated on a high throne in the background. Mix of dark ancient Chinese architecture and modern red LED screens. Dramatic dim lighting, cinematic dark fantasy, painterly style, atmospheric, 16:9 widescreen, no text, no watermark, no logos

Chinese underworld town square at warm sunset. Two figures facing each other in conversation. One imposing warrior figure in traditional Chinese armor with a large battle axe, one slender mysterious figure in white flowing robes. Long dramatic shadows cast on stone pavement. Stone archways, red paper lanterns, traditional Chinese architecture, warm orange sunset light, mystical atmosphere. Cinematic, painterly, atmospheric, 16:9 widescreen, no text, no watermark, no logos
